reasons: Angela can attach to Leomord during his mounted engage, giving him extra protection while he dives.
Leomord's chase style benefits from Angela's support because he often fights inside enemy territory.

proof.summary: Leomord commits with Barbiel, while Angela adds shield and attached support to help him survive the chase.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Leomord's mounted engage.
Leomord enters after the enemy has spent key control.
failureCases: Leomord dives too deep without cleanup targets.
Enemy anti-heal or burst removes the shield value quickly.

reasons: Floryn can heal Leomord globally while he chases deep with Barbiel.
Leomord benefits from mid-fight sustain because his cleanup pattern depends on staying alive through the first counter-hit.

proof.summary: Leomord extends the fight with mounted chase, while Floryn gives global healing to keep the cleanup attempt alive.
worksBestWhen: Floryn holds Bloom for Leomord's commit.
Leomord dives after enemies are already damaged.
failureCases: Leomord is chain-controlled before healing lands.
Leomord enters against full-health grouped enemies.

reasons: Tigreal can start the fight and lower enemy mobility before Leomord enters for cleanup.
Leomord can follow Tigreal's engage once enemies are grouped or displaced.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the teamfight opening, while Leomord enters after the control window to chase damaged enemies.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages before Leomord mounts in.
Leomord waits for enemy HP to drop before overcommitting.
failureCases: Leomord enters before the setup and gets focused.
Enemy disengages before Leomord reaches them.

reasons: Carmilla's link can help Leomord's team pressure multiple enemies during Leomord's cleanup timing.
Leomord's cleave and chase benefit when enemies are forced to respect shared damage and control pressure.

proof.summary: Carmilla links enemies in a fight, while Leomord uses mounted mobility to pressure the linked group and chase low-health targets.
worksBestWhen: Carmilla links multiple enemies before Leomord commits.
Leomord enters after allied damage has softened the group.
failureCases: Leomord chases one target away from the linked fight.
Enemy burst kills Leomord before cleanup begins.

reasons: Minotaur gives Leomord a stable front line and healing support during extended fights.
Minotaur's control can create the opening Leomord needs to enter with Barbiel.

proof.summary: Minotaur absorbs and disrupts the fight, while Leomord follows once enemies are controlled or damaged enough to chase.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur starts the fight near an objective or choke.
Leomord waits for Minotaur's control before committing.
failureCases: Minotaur and Leomord dive different targets.
Leomord enters before Minotaur has control ready.
Enemy kites backward and avoids Leomord's mounted pressure.
